changes: Nav: floating pill → bordered full-width bar with frost-on-scroll
Hero: removed pill badge, removed gradient text, removed hero-chip-row
Hero: tightened button radii from 9999px to 6px
Bento grid: removed gradient background, simplified to flat surface with hairline top
Cards: removed glow/shadow effects, kept border-color shift on hover
CTA stage: removed radial gradient background, simplified to flat elevated surface
Feature icons: removed glow box-shadow
Pricing cards: removed shadow-glow on highlighted tier
Footer: converted to Ft5 Statement (centered closing line + link meta)
Landing root: removed AmbientBg and landing-mesh overlay
Beam border: replaced spinning conic-gradient with static hairline
Signal dots: removed pulsing glow animation
Button shine: removed sheen-sweep animation
Section rail: simplified to solid hairline
Stats glass: removed glow border and shadow
Primary button hover: removed shadow-glow
Reduced-motion: cleaned up references to removed animations
Added .eyebrow mono label class for Cobalt structural labels
Added .bento-tile-wide and .bento-tile-tall span classes
Added .nav-frosted class for frost-on-scroll toggle
